tasks.title: Project & package scaffold — Xcode project + three empty SPM packages wired as target dependencies, file-system-synchronized groups enabled to avoid project.pbxproj conflicts
acceptance_criteria: swift build succeeds for all three empty packages
Xcode project builds and launches a blank app on simulator
app target links against all three packages
adding a new .swift file to any package Sources folder requires no Package.swift or project.pbxproj edit

tasks.title: CockpitDomain: review state machine, worst-status derivation, rework-note validation, core enums
acceptance_criteria: exhaustive transition-table coverage: all 4 states x 3 actions tested, illegal transitions rejected
whitespace-only rework note rejected after trim
zero SwiftData/SwiftUI/UIKit imports anywhere in this package
swift test completes in under 1 second

tasks.title: CockpitData: SwiftData @Model types (Campaign, Asset, AssetVersion, ReviewEvent) plus CockpitSchemaV1 and migration plan
acceptance_criteria: all four @Model types compile and round-trip through an in-memory ModelConfiguration(isStoredInMemoryOnly: true) container
CockpitSchemaV1 + empty SchemaMigrationPlan.stages compiles and opens a store
AssetVersion has no embedded byte-content field, only relativeFilePath/fileType/fileSizeBytes
Asset.currentVersionID is the only field a version-add mutates on the parent Asset row

tasks.title: CockpitData: repository actors (Campaign/Asset/ReviewEvent) — snapshot-only reads, no @Model leaking across the actor boundary
acceptance_criteria: package compiles clean under Swift 6 strict concurrency with no @unchecked Sendable anywhere
CampaignRepository and AssetRepository expose no fetch* method returning [Campaign]/[Asset] — @Query/@Bindable is the only read path in views
applyTransition auto-reverts campaign to Draft and appends a system ReviewEvent when the only in-review asset is soft-deleted
ReviewEventRepository.append never mutates an existing row, only inserts

tasks.title: CockpitServices: file-backed asset store, atomic import writes, ImportError surface
acceptance_criteria: writes go to a temp file then rename into Application Support/marketing_assets, never a direct in-place write
validatePresentable does a synchronous existence + non-zero-size check
integration test against a real temp Application Support directory proves atomicity under a simulated interrupted write
UniformTypeIdentifiers check rejects a mislabeled file extension (e.g. .mov renamed to .jpg)

tasks.title: CockpitServices: ImportCoordinator (file-write-before-record-create ordering, security-scoped resource handling) and ThumbnailProviding
acceptance_criteria: fault-injectable repository/file wrapper test proves a mid-write failure leaves an orphaned file, never a dangling metadata pointer
.fileImporter security-scoped resource is opened and closed synchronously around the copy, never held across an await boundary
thumbnail generation is cached in-memory and never blocks the calling List's scroll in a UI performance test

tasks.title: CockpitServices: SoftDeleteCoordinator (scheduled deletion + dual reconcile triggers) and StartupRecoveryService
acceptance_criteria: reconcile(now:) is driven off persisted scheduledDeletionAt, not a live Timer/Task.sleep
deterministic ClockService-backed test proves items past their window finalize and items inside the window are untouched
reconcile is exercised both as a cold-launch call and as a scenePhase-active call in tests
StartupRecoveryService cleans up any import left incomplete by a simulated force-kill

tasks.title: Cross-cutting utilities: ClockService, ErrorPresenter, AppLogger, AccessibilityLabelFactory
acceptance_criteria: ClockService is injectable (no direct Date() calls in SoftDeleteCoordinator or elsewhere that needs deterministic tests)
ErrorPresenter maps TransitionError and ImportError to user-facing retryable strings without leaking internal error text
AppLogger is OSLog-backed only, no analytics/remote logging call sites anywhere
AccessibilityLabelFactory produces the exact locked label strings ('Status: Needs Rework', 'Version 2 of 2, current') verified by unit test

tasks.title: App shell: AppEnvironment construction, Route/HistoryScope, NavigationStack wiring (M4 checkpoint)
acceptance_criteria: AppEnvironment is constructed exactly once at launch and injected via .environment(_:)
no file outside this task's ownership touches ModelContext directly (grep-verifiable across Features/)
app launches to an empty Campaign List through the real (non-mock) repository stack

tasks.title: Shared UI components: StatusChip, VersionBadge, EmptyStateView, ErrorStateView, SkeletonRow/SkeletonList, UndoToast, ProgressImportRow
acceptance_criteria: StatusChip is the single call site producing color+icon+text+accessibility label — no screen hardcodes a status color
every chip/badge label routes through AccessibilityLabelFactory from T-008
color is never the only signal on any component in this file set

tasks.title: Campaign List screen + Create Campaign sheet
acceptance_criteria: booting/empty/loaded/error states are all real and independently reachable by wiping the store
one-tap CTA from empty state creates a campaign with only the brief field filled in under 15 seconds
swipe-to-delete triggers SoftDeleteCoordinator and shows UndoToast, undo restores the campaign

tasks.title: Campaign Detail screen
acceptance_criteria: loading/no-assets/has-assets/import-in-progress/import-failed states all real, no-assets copy distinct from Campaign List's empty copy
brief field is inline-editable, committed on blur, no separate save button
Add Asset via PhotosPicker or .fileImporter routes through ImportCoordinator from T-006 with inline retry on failure

tasks.title: Asset Detail screen — nine-state machine, QuickLook preview, version strip, Approve/Rework actions
acceptance_criteria: all nine locked states are reachable including removedWhileViewing, which auto-pops to Campaign Detail after a short delay
Approve is a genuine two-tap confirm, never a single tap; PrimaryActionButton and SecondaryActionButton are separate components, not one button with a style flag
Needs Rework submit stays disabled until ReworkNoteValidator.isValid is true on trimmed text
opening an old version shows the 'Viewing read-only' banner via StateBanner and cannot mutate state

tasks.title: Status History screen
acceptance_criteria: loading/empty/listing/error states all real
system-generated lines are visually distinct from user actions via EventActor, not inferred from event kind at render time
rework notes render inline, never behind a tap
a full v1-rework-v2-approve cycle produces a correctly ordered, gap-free, duplicate-free log after relaunch

tasks.title: About/Limitations screen (should-have, non-blocking)
acceptance_criteria: discloses single-device data loss risk, standard iCloud device backup behavior, and unbounded version-storage growth as named limitations
self-contained screen, does not modify any file owned by another lane

tasks.title: Accessibility and Dynamic Type audit (Asset Detail as densest-screen stress test)
acceptance_criteria: Asset Detail reflows without clipping at largest accessibility Dynamic Type size
VoiceOver focus order verified: preview -> version badge -> version strip -> primary action -> secondary action
orange-on-white (Needs Rework) contrast checked in light and dark mode
this task adds only new test files, it does not edit any Features/ view file

tasks.title: End-to-end relaunch and integration verification (M6 gate — the product's core credibility claim)
acceptance_criteria: full v1 -> submit -> rework(note) -> v2 -> submit -> approve -> history cycle survives a real XCUIApplication terminate() + fresh launch() with every version and timestamp intact
deleting the only in-review asset auto-reverts its campaign to Draft with a logged system line, tested as its own scenario
an undo countdown survives a scenePhase background/foreground cycle without a force-kill
viewing an asset that gets removed while on-screen shows the terminal removedWhileViewing state, not a crash or stale UI
